games.title: GameHub 3D
games.tagline: Four arcade classics reborn on a torch-lit tavern table — in full real-time 3D.
games.download_note: Unzip and run GameHub3D.exe. Windows may show a SmartScreen warning for new indie games — choose “More info → Run anyway”.
games.description_html:
Step into a candle-lit medieval tavern where every game in the hall is played on a real 3D table. One hub, four games, one Hall of Records.

  • Evolving Pong — the ball mutates through 11 geometric shapes, each with its own wild physics: curveball teardrops, axis-flipping crosses, paddle-threading rings. A goblin heckler drops by to insult your play.
  • Hangman — guess the word before the guillotine falls, staged in a moonlit 3D execution yard with a full story sequence for every win and loss.
  • Serpent — slither through a torch-lit courtyard devouring 15 villagers, leaving very permanent evidence.
  • Connect Four: Jar the Goblins — severed heads vs goblins sealed in glass jars, with a depth-6 minimax AI on Hard and jars that slowly fill with blood.

Every score is chronicled in the tavern's Hall of Records. All audio is procedurally generated; all textures are CC0 photoscans lit in real time.
meta: Mouse + keyboard (W/S, arrows, Esc to pause)
Godot 4.7 Forward+ with Jolt physics — dedicated GPU recommended
Godot 4.7.1 · built with AI assistance (Claude) · CC0 assets from Poly Haven
